query:
-- 查询物料A1502484的供应商映射
SELECT 
  msm.materialCode,
  msm.supplierId,
  s.supplierName AS supplier_table_name,
  (SELECT DISTINCT ar.supplierName 
   FROM actual_receipts ar 
   WHERE ar.materialCode = msm.materialCode 
   LIMIT 1) AS erp_supplier_name
FROM material_supplier_mappings msm
JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = msm.supplierId
WHERE msm.materialCode = 'A1502484'
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
  msm.materialCode,
  msm.supplierId,
  s.supplierName AS supplier_table_name,
  (SELECT DISTINCT ar.supplierName 
   FROM actual_receipts ar 
   WHERE ar.materialCode = msm.materialCode 
   LIMIT 1) AS erp_supplier_name
FROM material_supplier_mappings msm
JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = msm.supplierId
